XSS.description: XSS vulnerabilities indicate failure in application security controls
XSS.subcategory: Software platforms are inventoried and secured

SQL Injection.description: SQL injection can lead to unauthorized data access and exfiltration
SQL Injection.subcategory: Data in transit and at rest are protected from unauthorized access

Command Injection.description: Command injection allows complete system compromise
Command Injection.subcategory: Log records are generated and made available for monitoring

Missing Security Header.description: Missing headers indicate gaps in configuration baseline
Missing Security Header.subcategory: Configuration management practices are established and maintained

Sensitive File Exposed.description: Exposed files indicate access control failures
Sensitive File Exposed.subcategory: Access permissions and authorizations are managed

Information Disclosure.description: Disclosed server info aids attackers in asset enumeration
Information Disclosure.subcategory: Software platforms and applications are inventoried

Directory Listing Enabled.description: Directory listing indicates misconfigured web server
Directory Listing Enabled.subcategory: Configuration management practices are established and maintained
